","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/components/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/components/README.md","text":"# components > Reusable UI component framework with composable mixins and facade components Build complex interactive widgets by combining small, focused building blocks. ## Key features * **Facade components** -- ready-to-use `pills` (with inline/popup filtering) and `vtabs` components * **Mixin system** -- composable behaviours: state handling, single/multi select, delegation * **Style-by-type** -- swappable visual styles (e.g., `simple-hoverable-pill`, `tabs-style`) * **Menu component** -- configurable menu with delegate-based actions * **Showcase** -- live interactive examples demonstrating all components ## Prerequisites No external prerequisites. ## Quick start Use facade components directly via transclusion. UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Three-layer mixin system * ''rrc0.* (Core/Model)'' — element list, type mapping, visibility, view dispatch, click dispatch, CSS classes ** `rrc0.elems()` — returns element list ** `rrc0.elem-type(element)` — maps element to type code ** `rrc0.elem-visible(element)` — visibility filter ** `rrc0.elem-view(element)` — rendering dispatch ** `rrc0.elem-clicked(element)` — click handler dispatch ** `rrc0.elem-add-class(element)` — CSS class dispatch * ''rrc1.* (Behavior)'' — state handling, selection, type-specific handlers ** State functions, sync functions, type-specific handlers ** Delegation pattern: check `rrc1.:`, fallback to `rrc1.`, use default !! Facade components |!Facade |!Parameters |!Key slots |!Rendering | |`pills` |elements, selection, filterable, sync-tiddler, sync-field, state, instid |view, on-select |Transcludes `core/menu` | |`vtabs` |elements, type-fn, state, instid, visible-types, default-collapsed, lnk-navigate |view-sec, view-act, view-pop, view-lnk, view-sco, view-spa, view (fallback) |Inlines render loop | !! Core renderer `core/menu.tid`: generic renderer with `$eventcatcher` catching clicks on `.rrc-elem`, dispatching to `rrc0.elem-clicked`. !! Why vtabs inlines the render loop `$slot` inside `\procedure` doesn't find `$fill` from outer `$transclude $tiddler=`. vtabs puts `$slot` at body level with `<%if%>` type branching as a workaround. pills works because it transcludes `core/menu` (intermediate tiddler boundary). <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="warning"> <$fill $name="body">`$slot` inside `\procedure` does NOT find `$fill` from an outer `$transclude $tiddler=` — this is a TiddlyWiki limitation. Use body-level `$slot` with `<%if%>` branching as a workaround. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/dev-workflow":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/dev-workflow","created":"20260305110450250","modified":"20260305110450250","rdt.order":"3","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Dev Workflow","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Plugin files |!File |!Role | |`components/pills.tid` |Pills facade component | |`components/vtabs.tid` |Vertical tabs facade component | |`core/menu.tid` |Generic element renderer | |`core/mixins/bytype/*.tid` |Delegate mixins (view, click, visibility, class) | |`core/mixins/state-handling.tid` |State tiddler/field computation | |`core/mixins/utils.tid` |Sync utilities | |`core/styles/bytype/*.tid` |Type-specific CSS | |`showcase.tid` |Live demo | !! Restart rules |!Change |!Restart needed? | |Edit existing `.tid` |No — filesystem-watcher syncs | |Add/delete/rename `.tid` |Yes — directory scan at boot | !! Creating a new facade # Create `.tid` in `components/` directory # Set title under `$:/plugins/rimir/components/` # Add `\parameters` declaration with defaults # `\import` needed mixins from `core/mixins/` # Define `rrc0.elems`, `rrc0.elem-type` # Define `rrc1.*` handlers (state, click, view) # Add CSS (class-prefixed, not `@scope`) # Transclude `core/menu` or inline the render loop # Restart server !! Adding an element type to vtabs # Choose a type code (e.g., `sec`, `act`, `lnk`) # Add click handler: `rrc1.elem-clicked:` # Add view slot in body-level `<%if%>` chain # Add CSS for the type # Add to `visible-types` default parameter !! Known limitations * `@scope` CSS is Chrome-only — use class-prefixed CSS instead * `$slot` in procedures — see Architecture section * No click slots in vtabs (hardcoded behaviors) <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip"> <$fill $name="body">CSS uses class prefixes (`.rrc-pills`, `.rrc-vtabs`) instead of `@scope` for Firefox compatibility. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/examples","created":"20260305110450250","modified":"20260305110450250","rdt.order":"4","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Examples","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Pills — minimal multi-select ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Red Green Blue" selection="multi" /> ``` !! Pills — single-select ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Option-A Option-B Option-C" selection="single" /> ``` !! Pills — with filtering ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="[tag[Topic]]" selection="multi" filterable="yes" /> ``` !! Pills — custom view slot ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Alpha Beta Gamma" selection="multi"> <$fill $name="view"> <> ``` !! Pills — syncing to external tiddler ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Tag1 Tag2 Tag3" selection="multi" sync-tiddler="MyTiddler" sync-field="tags" /> ``` !! Vertical tabs — basic setup ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="[tag[Section]]" type-fn="[get[elem-type]]" visible-types="sec act lnk"> <$fill $name="view-sec"> Section: <> <$fill $name="view-act"> Action: <> ``` !! Raw mixin usage (advanced) ``` \import [[$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/...]] \procedure rrc0.elems() item1 item2 item3 \procedure rrc0.elem-type(element) selector \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:selector(element) ... <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/menu"/> ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body">Facade components handle all mixin wiring. Raw mixin usage is only needed for building entirely new component types. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/faq":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/faq","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","rdt.order":"5","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"FAQ","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Q: When should I use a facade vs raw mixins? Use facades (`pills`, `vtabs`) for standard use cases — they handle all mixin wiring internally. Use raw mixins only when you need a completely new component type that doesn't fit either facade's rendering model. !! Q: Why doesn't $slot work inside my \procedure? This is a TiddlyWiki limitation. `$slot` inside `\procedure` cannot find `$fill` from an outer `$transclude $tiddler=` call. The workaround is to place `$slot` at body level (outside any procedure) with `<%if%>` branching. This is why vtabs inlines its render loop instead of using `core/menu.tid`. !! Q: How do I add a new element type? # Choose a type code (e.g., `mytype`) # Add a view delegate in `core/mixins/bytype/view-delegate.tid` (or define `rrc1.elem-view:mytype` in your component) # Add a click handler: `rrc1.elem-clicked:mytype` # Add CSS for the type (class-prefixed, e.g., `.rrc-pills .rrc-elem-mytype`) # If using vtabs, add an `<%if%>` branch and include the code in `visible-types` !! Q: Why no @scope CSS? `@scope` is Chrome-only as of early 2026. For cross-browser compatibility, the components use class-prefixed CSS (`.rrc-pills`, `.rrc-vtabs`) to scope styles. !! Q: How do I sync component state to an external tiddler? Use the `sync-tiddler` and `sync-field` parameters on pills. The component reads initial state from and writes selection changes to the specified tiddler field. For vtabs, the `state` parameter controls where the active tab state is stored. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/overview","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","rdt.hub-category":"ui-framework","rdt.hub-category-name":"UI Framework & Domain Model","rdt.hub-order":"3","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! What it does Reusable UI component framework with composable mixins. Provides facade components (pills, vtabs) that most users consume, and a raw mixin system for advanced customization. !! Features * ''Facade components'' — ready-to-use: `pills` (selectable tags), `vtabs` (collapsible vertical tabs) * ''Three-layer mixin system'' — `rrc0.*` (core/model), `rrc1.*` (behavior), consumer overrides * ''Slot-based customization'' — `$fill` slots for custom rendering and callbacks * ''State management'' — automatic state tiddler handling, sync to external tiddlers/fields * ''Type dispatch'' — element types control rendering, click behavior, and visibility !! Quick start Two modes: * ''Facades'' (recommended): transclude `pills` or `vtabs` with parameters + slots * ''Raw mixins'' (advanced): import mixins directly, define `rrc0.*`/`rrc1.*` functions Example pills usage: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Alpha Beta Gamma" selection="multi" /> ``` Example vtabs usage: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="[tag[Section]]" type-fn="[get[elem-type]]" /> ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body">Facades handle all mixin wiring internally. Most users never need to touch the `rrc0.*`/`rrc1.*` layer directly. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/reference":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/reference","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","rdt.order":"6","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"Reference","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Pills parameters |!Parameter |!Default |!Description | |`elements` |`""` |Space-separated list or TW filter | |`selection` |`"multi"` |`"multi"` or `"single"` | |`filterable` |`"no"` |`"no"`, `"yes"` (popup), or `"inline"` (search input above pills) | |`sync-tiddler` |`""` |External tiddler to sync state to | |`sync-field` |`"text"` |Field on sync-tiddler | |`state` |auto-generated |State tiddler for selection | |`instid` |auto-generated |Instance ID for CSS scoping | !! Pills slots |!Slot name |!Variables |!Description | |`view` |`element` |Custom element rendering | |`on-select` |`element`, `modifier` |Callback on selection change | !! Vtabs parameters |!Parameter |!Default |!Description | |`elements` |`""` |TW filter returning element titles | |`type-fn` |`""` |Filter to get element type code | |`state` |auto-generated |State tiddler for active tab | |`instid` |auto-generated |Instance ID | |`visible-types` |`"sec"` |Space-separated always-visible type codes | |`default-collapsed` |`"yes"` |Start with sections collapsed | |`lnk-navigate` |`"yes"` |Navigate on link-type click | !! Vtabs slots |!Slot name |!Variables |!Description | |`view-sec` |`element` |Render for type `sec` | |`view-act` |`element` |Render for type `act` | |`view-pop` |`element` |Render for type `pop` (popup) | |`view-lnk` |`element` |Render for type `lnk` (link) | |`view-sco` |`element` |Render for type `sco` (scope) | |`view-spa` |`element` |Render for type `spa` (spacer) | |`view` |`element` |Fallback render for unknown types | !! Mixin functions — Layer 0 (rrc0.*) |!Function |!Purpose | |`rrc0.elems()` |Returns element list (space-separated or filter) | |`rrc0.elem-type(element)` |Maps element to type code | |`rrc0.elem-visible(element)` |Visibility filter for element | |`rrc0.elem-view(element)` |Rendering dispatch | |`rrc0.elem-clicked(element)` |Click handler dispatch | |`rrc0.elem-add-class(element)` |CSS class dispatch | !! Mixin functions — Layer 1 (rrc1.*) |!Function |!Purpose | |`rrc1.elem-clicked:(element)` |Type-specific click handler | |`rrc1.elem-view:(element)` |Type-specific view | |`rrc1.state.tiddler(key, uid)` |Returns state tiddler title | |`rrc1.state.prefix()` |Returns state tiddler prefix | |`rrc1.state.field(key)` |Returns state field name | |`rrc1.elem-selected(tiddler, field, element, yes, no)` |Check if element is selected | |`rrc1.elem-add-class(element)` |Returns CSS class for selected state | !! CSS classes |!Class |!Description | |`.rrc-component` |Inner component container | |`.rrc-elem` |Individual element (click target) | |`.selected` |Added to selected elements | |`.rrc-type-` |Per-type styling hook (e.g., `.rrc-type-sec`) | |`.rrc-pills` |Pills container scope | |`.rrc-vtabs` |Vtabs container scope | |`.rrc-pills-inline-filter` |Inline filter input container | |`.rrc-no-propagate` |Stops click propagation — wrap interactive elements in vtabs fills with this class to prevent row click handlers from firing | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/tw-internals":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/doc/tw-internals","created":"20260305110450251","modified":"20260305110450251","rdt.order":"7","rdt.plugin-key":"components","rdt.plugin-name":"components","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Reusable UI component framework with mixin system","rdt.section":"TW Internals","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! \import pragma Pulls functions/procedures from tiddlers into scope. Used for mixin composition (last-wins semantics). !! \parameters Declares tiddler-level parameters with defaults. Facades use this for their public API. !! $transclude modes * `$transclude $tiddler=""` — creates new transclusion boundary (slot/fill works) * `$transclude $variable=""` — does NOT create boundary (slot may not find fill) !! $slot / $fill * Insert content at predefined points in templates * ''Critical limitation'': no colons in `$name` (fails silently) — use hyphens * ''Critical limitation'': `$slot` in `\procedure` doesn't find `$fill` from `$transclude $tiddler=` * Workaround: body-level `$slot` with `<%if%>` branching * Why pills works: intermediate `core/menu` tiddler transclusion creates boundary !! $eventcatcher Catches click events matching CSS selectors. Sets `dom-data-*` variables from `data-*` attributes on clicked elements. !! <%if%> Conditional rendering widget. Used in vtabs for type-based branching at body level. !! code-body: yes Field that tells TW to treat tiddler body as `\function`/`\procedure`/`\parameters` definitions. !! is[variable] Filter operator that checks if a variable/function is defined in current scope. <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="danger"> <$fill $name="body">Never use colons in `$slot`/`$fill` `$name` attributes (e.g., `$name="view:sco"`). TW silently fails — no error, just falls back to default content. Use hyphens instead: `$name="view-sco"`. See the [[readme|$:/plugins/rimir/components/readme]] tab for a basic overview. <%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/icon":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/icon","created":"20260305110450252","modified":"20260305110450252","type":"image/svg+xml","text":""},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/architecture","created":"20260329120000000","modified":"20260329120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page","llm-help-path":"components/architecture","llm-help-description":"Mixin system internals — rrc0/rrc1 layers, delegates, dispatch pattern, core/menu renderer","llm-help-context":"rimir/components","llm-help-sort":"03","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Component Architecture — Mixin System Understanding the internals is essential for composing custom components or inventing new facades. Three-layer model: **Layer 0 — `rrc0.*` (Core/Model)**: Dispatch functions that route to layer 1. These are defined by the delegate mixins and should NOT be overridden. - `rrc0.elems()` — returns the element list (defined by the facade) - `rrc0.elem-type(element)` — maps element to type code (defined by the facade) - `rrc0.elem-visible(element, element-type)` — dispatches to `rrc1.elem-visible:` or `rrc1.elem-visible` or defaults to `yes` - `rrc0.elem-view(element, element-type)` — dispatches to `rrc1.elem-view:` or renders element as plain text - `rrc0.elem-clicked()` — reads `dom-data-elem` and `dom-data-elem-type` from the click event, dispatches to `rrc1.elem-clicked:` or `rrc1.elem-clicked` - `rrc0.elem-add-class(element, element-type)` — dispatches to `rrc1.elem-add-class:` or `rrc1.elem-add-class` **Layer 1 — `rrc1.*` (Behavior)**: Type-specific handlers. This is where facades define their behavior. - `rrc1.elem-clicked:(element, modifier, relative-coords)` — type-specific click handler (procedure) - `rrc1.elem-clicked(element, modifier, relative-coords)` — generic click handler (fallback) - `rrc1.elem-view:(element)` — type-specific view renderer (procedure) - `rrc1.elem-visible(element, element-type)` or `rrc1.elem-visible:(element)` — visibility check (function returning `yes`/`no`) - `rrc1.elem-add-class(element)` or `rrc1.elem-add-class:(element)` — extra CSS classes (function) - `rrc1.state.prefix()` — state tiddler prefix (function) - `rrc1.state.tiddler(key, uid)` — computes state tiddler title (function) - `rrc1.state.field(key)` — state field name, default `text` (function) - `rrc1.uid()` — unique instance ID (function) - `rrc1.sync.tiddler()` — external sync tiddler (function) - `rrc1.sync.field()` — external sync field (function) **Layer 2 — Consumer**: The tiddler that transcludes the facade, providing `$fill` slots. Dispatch pattern (for every operation): 1. Check if `rrc1.:` exists (type-specific) → use it 2. Check if `rrc1.` exists (generic) → use it 3. Use default behavior Available mixins (imported via `\import`): |!Mixin |!Path |!Provides | |state-handling |`core/mixins/state-handling` |`rrc1.state.prefix`, `rrc1.state.tiddler`, `rrc1.state.field` | |multi-select |`core/mixins/multi-select` |`rrc1.elem-clicked` (toggle in list), `rrc1.elem-selected` | |single-select |`core/mixins/single-select` |`rrc1.elem-clicked` (set single value), `rrc1.elem-selected` | |utils |`core/mixins/utils` |`$rrcu.ac.sync-with-list`, `$rrcu.ac.sync-with-field` widgets | |view-delegate |`core/mixins/bytype/view-delegate` |`rrc0.elem-view` dispatcher | |click-delegate |`core/mixins/bytype/click-delegate` |`rrc0.elem-clicked` dispatcher | |visibility-delegate |`core/mixins/bytype/visibility-delegate` |`rrc0.elem-visible` dispatcher | |class-delegate |`core/mixins/bytype/class-delegate` |`rrc0.elem-add-class` dispatcher | Core renderer — `core/menu.tid`: The generic renderer used by pills (vtabs inlines its own). It: 1. Iterates `[function[rrc0.elems]]` 2. Computes element type via `rrc0.elem-type` 3. Checks visibility via `rrc0.elem-visible` 4. Renders each element as `` 5. Wraps everything in `$eventcatcher` that catches clicks on `.rrc-elem` and calls `rrc0.elem-clicked` Critical TW limitation: `$slot` inside `\procedure` does NOT find `$fill` from an outer `$transclude $tiddler=`. Workarounds: - Transclude an intermediate tiddler (like pills transcludes `core/menu`) — `$slot` works across tiddler boundaries - Inline the render loop with body-level `$slot` and `<%if%>` branching (like vtabs does) Navigate to: llm_help("components/facades") for component reference, llm_help("components/recipes") for composition patterns, llm_help("components/new-facade") for creating new facades "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/facades":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/facades","created":"20260329120000000","modified":"20260329120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page","llm-help-path":"components/facades","llm-help-description":"Component reference — available facade components and their APIs","llm-help-context":"rimir/components/using_existing","llm-help-sort":"01","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Facade Components Facades are the public API of the components plugin. Each facade is a single tiddler you transclude with parameters and customize via `$fill` slots. Available facades: - **pills** (`$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills`) — Horizontal selection pills. Multi-select or single-select. Optional filtering. Syncs selection to any tiddler field. Use for: tag selection, filter toggles, option pickers. - **vtabs** (`$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs`) — Vertical tab list with typed elements (sections, actions, links, subcomponents, spacers). Sections collapse/expand. Use for: navigation sidebars, settings panels, tool palettes. Navigate deeper: llm_help("components/facades/pills"), llm_help("components/facades/vtabs") "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/new-facade":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/new-facade","created":"20260329120000000","modified":"20260329120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page","llm-help-path":"components/new-facade","llm-help-description":"How to create a new facade component — skeleton, mixins, handlers, styling, TW limitations","llm-help-context":"rimir/components/creating_new","llm-help-sort":"05","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Creating a New Facade Component A facade is a `.tid` file that composes mixins into a self-contained component with a `\parameters` API and `$slot`/`$fill` customization points. Step-by-step process: 1. Create the tiddler file in the components plugin directory 2. Define parameters, import mixins, define rrc0/rrc1 functions 3. Add the render loop (transclude core/menu or inline) 4. Add CSS (class-prefixed stylesheet) 5. Restart the wiki server (new .tid files require restart) Skeleton for a new facade (using core/menu): ``` code-body: yes title: $:/plugins/rimir/components/myfacade type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki \parameters (elements:"", selection:"multi", state:"", instid:"") \import $:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/utils $:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/bytype/visibility-delegate $:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/bytype/class-delegate $:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/bytype/view-delegate $:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/bytype/click-delegate $:/plugins/rimir/components/core/mixins/state-handling \function rrc1.state.prefix() [!is[blank]]~[[$:/state/rimir/components/myfacade]] \function rrc1.uid() [!is[blank]]~[] \function rrc1.sync.tiddler() [function[rrc1.state.tiddler],[],] \function rrc1.sync.field() text \function rrc0.elems() [subfilter] \function rrc0.elem-type(element) selector \function rrc1.elem-selected(tiddler, field, element, yes, no) [getenlist-input[]matchthenelse] \function rrc1.elem-add-class(element) [function[rrc1.sync.tiddler]]:map[function[rrc1.elem-selected],,,,[selected]] \procedure rrc1.elem-clicked(element, modifier, relative-coords) <$let st={{{[function[rrc1.sync.tiddler]]}}} sf={{{[]}}}><$rrcu.ac.sync-with-list tiddler=<> field=<> element=<>/><$slot $name="on-select" element=<> modifier=<>/> \end \procedure rrc1.elem-view:selector(element) <$slot $name="view" element=<>><> \end
<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/core/menu"> <$fill $name="additional-contents">
``` Key decisions when designing a facade: **Single type vs multi-type?** - Single type (like pills): all elements behave the same. Use one type code (e.g., `selector`). Simpler — use core/menu. - Multi-type (like vtabs): elements have different behaviors based on type. Need a `type-fn` parameter and type-specific handlers. May need to inline the render loop for slot support. **Using core/menu vs inlining?** - core/menu: simpler, works when `$slot` is inside a procedure that core/menu calls (pills pattern). `$fill` content is found because core/menu is an intermediate tiddler transclusion. - Inline: necessary when you need body-level `$slot` per type (vtabs pattern). Copy the render loop from core/menu and add `<%if%>` branching with `$slot` calls. **Selection model?** - Import `multi-select` mixin for toggle behavior - Import `single-select` mixin for replace behavior - Or define custom `rrc1.elem-clicked` for entirely different behavior (e.g., navigate, delete, reorder) **Visibility?** - Default: all elements visible - Override `rrc1.elem-visible(element, element-type)` to return `yes`/`no` - Or define type-specific `rrc1.elem-visible:` for per-type visibility logic Adding a new element type to an existing facade: If extending vtabs with a new type code (e.g., `tog` for toggle): 1. Add click handler: `\procedure rrc1.elem-clicked:tog(element, modifier, relative-coords)` 2. Add `<%elseif [match[tog]]%><$slot $name="view-tog" ...>` in the render loop 3. Add CSS: `.rrc-vtabs span[data-elem-type="tog"] { ... }` Styling guidelines: - Use class-prefixed CSS: `.rrc-myfacade span.rrc-elem { ... }` - Never use `@scope` (Chrome-only) - Never use `!important` - Use palette colors: `<>`, `<>`, `<>`, etc. - Selected elements: `.rrc-myfacade span[data-elem-type].selected { ... }` - Per-type styles: `.rrc-myfacade span[data-elem-type="mytype"] { ... }` - Create a stylesheet tiddler tagged `$:/tags/Stylesheet` Important constraints: - `code-body: yes` is required on all facade tiddlers (prevents wikitext parsing of the pragma section) - `\import` must be a single line with all mixin paths space-separated - State tiddlers are auto-cleaned by TW only if under `$:/state/` or `$:/temp/` - The `` macro generates a unique ID per transclusion call stack — use it for `instid` default - Element values must not contain spaces (they are space-separated in lists) "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/overview","created":"20260329120000000","modified":"20260329120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page","llm-help-path":"components","llm-help-description":"UI component framework — pills (selection) and vtabs (vertical tabs with typed elements)","llm-help-context":"rimir/components","llm-help-sort":"01","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Components Plugin A UI component framework providing reusable, composable facade components. Each facade hides the internal mixin machinery behind a simple parameter + slot API. Available components: - **pills** — Horizontal selection pills. Multi-select or single-select. Optional filtering. Syncs selection to any tiddler field. Use for: tag selection, filter toggles, option pickers. - **vtabs** — Vertical tab list with typed elements (sections, actions, links, subcomponents, spacers). Sections collapse/expand. Use for: navigation sidebars, settings panels, tool palettes. Usage pattern (both components): ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="alpha beta gamma" selection="multi" state="$:/state/my/pills"> <$fill $name="view">Custom: <> <$fill $name="on-select"><$action-log message=<>/> ``` Key concepts: - **elements**: Space-separated list (or TW filter for vtabs) of items to display - **state**: Tiddler where component stores its internal state. Auto-generated if omitted, but provide an explicit one if you need to read the selection externally. - **slots**: `$fill` blocks that customize rendering and behavior - **sync**: Pills can sync selection to an external tiddler/field Navigate deeper: - llm_help("components/facades") — component reference: pills, vtabs, and future facades - llm_help("components/architecture") — mixin system internals (rrc0/rrc1 layers, delegates, core/menu) - llm_help("components/recipes") — custom combinations and composition patterns - llm_help("components/new-facade") — how to create entirely new facade components "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/pills-create":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/pills-create","created":"20260329120000000","modified":"20260329120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page","llm-help-path":"components/facades/pills/create","llm-help-description":"Step-by-step guide to adding pills to a tiddler","llm-help-context":"rimir/components/creating_new/pills","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Creating Pills — Step by Step 1. Decide the elements. These are the values the user picks from — typically a static space-separated list like `"red green blue"`. 2. Choose selection mode: `"multi"` (toggle, space-separated list result) or `"single"` (one active value). 3. If you need to read the selection from another tiddler or widget, set `sync-tiddler` and `sync-field`. Otherwise the selection is only available internally. 4. Set an explicit `state` if you need stable state across re-renders (e.g., `$:/state/myapp/color-pills`). Omit for throwaway usage. Minimal example (multi-select): ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="alpha beta gamma delta" selection="multi" state="$:/state/demo/pills"/> ``` Single-select with custom view: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="red green blue" selection="single" sync-tiddler="$:/temp/chosen-color" sync-field="text"> <$fill $name="view"> ● <> ``` With filtering and on-select callback: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="p-1 p-2 p-3 p-4 p-5 p-6 p-7 p-8" filterable="yes" selection="multi" state="$:/state/demo/filtered"> <$fill $name="view"> ''<$text text={{{[uppercase[]]}}}/>'' <$fill $name="on-select"> <$action-log message=`Selected: $(element)$`/> ``` Inline filter (search input above pills): ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="apple banana cherry date elderberry fig grape" filterable="inline" selection="multi" state="$:/state/demo/inline-filter"/> ``` Common patterns: - **Tag picker**: `elements` = list of available tags, `sync-tiddler` = target tiddler, `sync-field` = `"tags"` - **Filter toggle**: `elements` = filter options, read selection from `sync-tiddler` and use it in a filter elsewhere - **Dynamic elements**: Pills uses `[subfilter]` internally, so you can pass a real TW filter: `elements="[tag[Color]sort[title]]"`. A plain space-separated string like `"red green blue"` also works (subfilter treats each word as a title). See below. Dynamic elements — filters vs pre-computed strings: Both pills and vtabs accept TW filters in `elements` via `subfilter`. Prefer passing a filter directly over pre-computing a string: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="[tag[Project]sort[caption]]" selection="single" sync-tiddler="$:/state/active-project"/> <$let project-list={{{[tag[Project]status[active]sort[caption]join[ ]]}}}> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements=<> selection="single"/> <$wikify name="elems" text="""<$list filter="[tag[Project]]"><$text text=<>/> """> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements=<>/> ``` When you need `$wikify`: only when building a string that requires widget rendering (e.g., `get[caption]` per item) that `join[]` can't express. For simple title lists, `join[ ]` or a direct filter is always cleaner. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/pills":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/pills","created":"20260329120000000","modified":"20260329120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page","llm-help-path":"components/facades/pills","llm-help-description":"Pills component — parameters, slots, selection modes, filtering, sync","llm-help-context":"rimir/components/using_existing/pills","llm-help-sort":"01","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Pills Component — `$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills` Horizontal selection pills with optional filtering and external sync. Parameters: |!Parameter |!Default |!Description | |`elements` |`""` |Space-separated list of element values to display | |`selection` |`"multi"` |`"multi"` (toggle) or `"single"` (replace) | |`filterable` |`"no"` |`"no"`, `"yes"` (popup search), or `"inline"` (search input above pills) | |`sync-tiddler` |`""` |External tiddler to sync selection to (auto-generated if blank) | |`sync-field` |`"text"` |Field on sync-tiddler to store selection | |`state` |auto |State tiddler prefix (auto-qualified if blank) | |`instid` |auto |Unique instance ID (auto-qualified if blank) | Slots: |!Slot |!Variables |!Description | |`view` |`element` |Custom rendering of each pill. Default: plain text of element value | |`on-select` |`element`, `modifier` |Action widgets fired after selection changes | Selection behavior: - **multi**: Clicking toggles element in a space-separated list. Multiple elements can be active. - **single**: Clicking replaces the current value. Only one element active at a time. - Selected pills get CSS class `.selected`. Reading the selection externally: The selection is stored in `sync-tiddler` / `sync-field`. If you did not provide `sync-tiddler`, the selection is in the auto-generated state tiddler. To read it reliably, always set an explicit `sync-tiddler`. ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Tag1 Tag2 Tag3" selection="multi" sync-tiddler="MyTiddler" sync-field="tags"/> {{MyTiddler!!tags}} ``` Filtering modes: - `filterable="no"` — all pills always visible - `filterable="yes"` — click the arrow icon to open a popup search input; pills not matching the search text are hidden - `filterable="inline"` — search input rendered above the pills; pills not matching are hidden Navigate deeper: llm_help("components/facades/pills/create") for step-by-step creation guide "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/recipes":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/recipes","created":"20260329120000000","modified":"20260329120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page","llm-help-path":"components/recipes","llm-help-description":"Custom component recipes — combining facades, overriding behavior, inventing new patterns","llm-help-context":"rimir/components","llm-help-sort":"04","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Component Recipes — Custom Combinations These recipes show how to compose existing facades into custom UI patterns. All examples work in regular tiddler wikitext — no new facade .tid files needed. --- Recipe 1: Collapsible vtabs with detail panel A vtabs sidebar where clicking an `act` item shows its content in a detail area: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="general item-a item-b item-c advanced item-d item-e" type-fn="[match[general]then[sec]]~[match[advanced]then[sec]]~[[act]]" state="$:/state/my/settings" default-collapsed="no"> <$fill $name="view-sec"> <> <$fill $name="view-act"> ▶ <> <$reveal type="match" state="$:/state/my/settings:last-click" text="item-a"> Content for item A goes here. <$reveal type="match" state="$:/state/my/settings:last-click" text="item-b"> Content for item B goes here. ``` --- Recipe 2: Tag editor (pills synced to tiddler field) Use pills as a tag picker that writes directly to a tiddler's field: ``` Available tags: <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="important urgent review done blocked" selection="multi" sync-tiddler="MyTiddler" sync-field="tags"/> Currently set: {{MyTiddler!!tags}} ``` --- Recipe 3: Vtabs with nested pill filters (sco type) Each section contains a pill subcomponent for filtering: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="colors color-pills sizes size-pills" type-fn="[suffix[-pills]then[sco]]~[[sec]]" state="$:/state/my/filter-panel" default-collapsed="no"> <$fill $name="view-sec"> <> <$fill $name="view-sco"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements={{{[match[color-pills]then[red green blue yellow]else[S M L XL]]}}} selection="multi" sync-tiddler="$:/temp/my/filters" sync-field=<>/> ``` Read selected filters: `{{$:/temp/my/filters!!color-pills}}` and `{{$:/temp/my/filters!!size-pills}}` --- Recipe 4: Single-select pills as tab bar with content panels Use single-select pills as horizontal tabs: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="overview settings logs" selection="single" sync-tiddler="$:/state/my/tabs" sync-field="text"/> <$reveal type="match" state="$:/state/my/tabs" text="overview"> Overview content... <$reveal type="match" state="$:/state/my/tabs" text="settings"> Settings content... <$reveal type="match" state="$:/state/my/tabs" text="logs"> Logs content... ``` --- Recipe 5: Vtabs as navigation with tiddler links Use `lnk` type to build a navigation sidebar: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="Pages $:/myapp/home $:/myapp/settings $:/myapp/about" type-fn="[match[Pages]then[sec]]~[[lnk]]" state="$:/state/my/nav" default-collapsed="no"> <$fill $name="view-sec"> <> <$fill $name="view-lnk"> <$text text={{{[split[/]last[]]}}}/> ``` --- Recipe 6: Multi-select pills with action callback Trigger a side-effect each time a pill is toggled: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="feat-1 feat-2 feat-3" selection="multi" sync-tiddler="$:/config/features" sync-field="enabled"> <$fill $name="on-select"> <$action-log message=`Feature $(element)$ toggled`/> ``` --- Recipe 7: Dynamic elements from wiki data Elements can come from any source — pre-compute them with `$let`: ``` <$let project-list={{{[tag[Project]sort[title]join[ ]]}}}> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements=<> selection="single" sync-tiddler="$:/state/active-project"> <$fill $name="view"> <$text text={{{[get[caption]else]}}}/> ``` --- Recipe 8: Combining pills and vtabs for master-detail Horizontal pill tabs select a category, vtabs shows items in that category: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="tools settings info" selection="single" sync-tiddler="$:/state/category" sync-field="text"/> <$reveal type="match" state="$:/state/category" text="tools"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="section tool-a tool-b tool-c" type-fn="[match[section]then[sec]]~[[act]]" state="$:/state/tools-vtabs" default-collapsed="no"> <$fill $name="view-sec">Tools <$fill $name="view-act">▶ <> ``` Navigate to: llm_help("components/facades") for component reference, llm_help("components/new-facade") for building entirely new facade components guide to adding vtabs to a tiddler","llm-help-context":"rimir/components/creating_new/vtabs","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Creating Vtabs — Step by Step 1. Define your elements as a filter. Vtabs uses `[subfilter]`, so pass a filter that returns your element list. For a static list: `"alpha beta gamma"` works (treated as a title list). For dynamic: `"[tag[MyTag]sort[title]]"`. 2. Define the type function. This filter receives `<>` and returns a type code. Use `~` (else) chains with `prefix[]then[]` or `match[]then[]` patterns. 3. Provide `$fill` slots for each type you use. At minimum, provide `view-sec` for section headers and the relevant type slots. 4. Set `state` explicitly if you need to read `:last-click` or check collapse state externally. Minimal example (sections + actions): ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="settings item-1 item-2 item-3" type-fn="[match[settings]then[sec]else[act]]" state="$:/state/demo/vtabs"> <$fill $name="view-sec"> <> <$fill $name="view-act"> ▶ <> Last clicked: <$text text={{$:/state/demo/vtabs:last-click}}/> ``` With links and subcomponents: ``` <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements="nav home about contact tags" type-fn="[match[nav]then[sec]]~[match[tags]then[sco]]~[[lnk]]" state="$:/state/demo/vtabs-full"> <$fill $name="view-sec"> ☰ <> <$fill $name="view-lnk"> 🔗 <> <$fill $name="view-sco"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Tag1 Tag2 Tag3" selection="multi" state=`$:/state/demo/vtabs-full:$(element)$`/> ``` Dynamic elements from wiki data: ``` <$let my-elements={{{[tag[NavItem]sort[order]join[ ]]}}}> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs" elements=<> type-fn="[get[nav-type]]" state="$:/state/demo/vtabs-dynamic"> ...slots... ``` Common patterns: - **Settings panel**: `sec` for category headers, `act` for individual settings, read `last-click` to show the selected setting's detail view - **Navigation sidebar**: `sec` for groups, `lnk` for page links, `sco` for nested pill filters - **Tool palette**: `sec` for tool categories, `act` for tools, `spa` for visual separation between groups Tips: - Use `default-collapsed="no"` if you want all sections expanded on load - The `visible-types` parameter defaults to `"sec"` — add more types if they should remain visible when sections are collapsed (e.g., `visible-types="sec spa"`) - Subcomponents (`sco`) manage their own state independently — use backtick templates for unique state per element: `state=` `` `$:/state/parent:$(element)$` `` - Each `sec` element collapses independently — multiple sections in one vtabs each toggle their own children - If fills contain interactive elements (buttons, popups), wrap them with `class="rrc-no-propagate"` to prevent the row click handler from also firing: `<$button>...` "},"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/vtabs":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/components/llm-help/vtabs","created":"20260329120000000","modified":"20260329120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/llm-help/page","llm-help-path":"components/facades/vtabs","llm-help-description":"Vtabs component — parameters, element types, slots, collapse behavior","llm-help-context":"rimir/components/using_existing/vtabs","llm-help-sort":"02","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"Vtabs Component — `$:/plugins/rimir/components/vtabs` Vertical tab list with typed elements. Each element has a type that determines its behavior and appearance. Parameters: |!Parameter |!Default |!Description | |`elements` |`""` |TW filter returning element list | |`type-fn` |`""` |TW filter that maps `<>` to a type code (`sec`, `act`, `lnk`, `pop`, `sco`, `spa`) | |`state` |auto |State tiddler prefix | |`instid` |auto |Unique instance ID | |`visible-types` |`"sec"` |Space-separated type codes always visible (not affected by section collapse) | |`default-collapsed` |`"yes"` |Start with sections collapsed | |`lnk-navigate` |`"yes"` |Navigate to element title on `lnk` click | Element types: |!Type |!Click behavior |!Visibility |!Use for | |`sec` |Toggle section collapse |Always visible |Section headers, group dividers | |`act` |Stores element in `:last-click` |Follows section collapse |Action buttons, menu items | |`lnk` |Navigates to element (tiddler title) |Follows section collapse |Links to other tiddlers | |`pop` |No action (placeholder) |Follows section collapse |Informational items | |`sco` |No action (subcomponent handles clicks) |Follows section collapse |Nested components (e.g., pills inside vtabs) | |`spa` |No action |Follows section collapse |Visual spacers/separators | The `type-fn` filter receives `<>` and must return one type code. Use `then[]` chains: ``` [prefix[section-]then[sec]] ~[prefix[act-]then[act]] ~[prefix[lnk-]then[lnk]] ~[prefix[scomp-]then[sco]] ``` Slots (type-specific views): |!Slot |!Variables |!Description | |`view-sec` |`element` |Render section headers | |`view-act` |`element` |Render action items | |`view-lnk` |`element` |Render links | |`view-pop` |`element` |Render popup items | |`view-sco` |`element` |Render subcomponents | |`view-spa` |`element` |Render spacers | |`view` |`element`, `element-type` |Fallback for any type without a specific slot | Each type-specific slot falls back to the generic `view` slot, which falls back to rendering the element value as plain text. Section collapse: - Clicking a `sec` element toggles visibility of its child elements (elements between this `sec` and the next `sec`) - Each section collapses independently — toggling one section does not affect others - `default-collapsed="yes"` means only `sec` elements (and other `visible-types`) show on load - Elements before the first `sec` in the list are always visible - Collapse state is stored as a list of toggled sections in the state tiddler Interactive content in fills (stop-propagation): - Vtabs uses an `$eventcatcher` on `.rrc-elem` rows — clicks anywhere on a row trigger the type handler (e.g., `lnk` navigates) - To prevent this when fills contain buttons, popups, or other interactive elements, wrap them with `class="rrc-no-propagate"` - Example: `<$button>...` - The component catches clicks on `.rrc-no-propagate` elements and stops propagation before reaching the row handler Reading last action: When an `act` element is clicked, its value is stored in `:last-click`: ``` Last action: <$text text={{$:/state/my/vtabs:last-click}}/> ``` Navigate deeper: llm_help("components/facades/vtabs/create") for step-by-step creation guide Build complex interactive widgets by combining small, focused building blocks. !! Key features * ''Facade components'' — ready-to-use `pills` (with inline/popup filtering) and `vtabs` components * ''Mixin system'' — composable behaviours: state handling, single/multi select, delegation * ''Style-by-type'' — swappable visual styles (e.g., `simple-hoverable-pill`, `tabs-style`) * ''Menu component'' — configurable menu with delegate-based actions * ''Showcase'' — live interactive examples demonstrating all components !! Prerequisites No external prerequisites. !! Quick start Use facade components directly via transclusion. See the showcase tiddler (`$:/plugins/rimir/components/showcase`) for interactive examples of all available components and mixins. Standalone Pills (minimal) Multi-select pills with default styling — just pass `elements` and go: <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="alpha beta gamma delta epsilon" selection="multi" state="$:/state/showcase/pills-basic"/> !! 2.
